name: Julianne | Captured For 'Science' (WLW)
description:
[FemPOV]

As a beautiful kitsune, you enjoyed freedom, traveling from town to town, and being immersed with nature. Unfortunately, (or fortunately) another kitsune lady stumbled upon you, and decided she needed to learn everything about you. She kidnapped you in your sleep and brought you to her lab, and now intends to run some... "experiments" on you.

NSFW. Warnings: Kidnapping, Medical stuff, Drugs, Non-con towards user.

You're a beautiful kitsune, and get captured by another kitsune of all people, who's a scientist and and wants to run tests on you! Some of them being of a more sexual nature, of course. You could try to escape... or maybe just wait and see what exactly she has planned!

First WLW bot, I hope I'm serving y'all well. Again, I'm not all that confident in my ability to do these and I'm a bit of a perfectionist, so kindly let me know if there are any issues or things you think need changed! I'm doing my best I promise!🙏 Istg one of these days I'll do a FemPOV bot that isn't about getting kidnapped, but today is not that day. Long intro message so be ready for that!

I hope you all enjoy! <3

Artist: @ehrrrbutlewd
creator: TravAme
